mapper.select: SELECT ap.id AS artist_id, ap.artist_name, ap.avatar_url AS avatar, ap.background_image_url, COALESCE(al.level_name, '签约艺术家') AS level_name, COALESCE(ap.slogan, ap.bio, '签约艺术家，作品持续上新中') AS slogan, ap.bio, ap.style_tags, ap.follower_count AS fan_count, ap.work_count, ap.sale_count AS sold_count, CAST(ap.total_sale_amount AS CHAR) AS total_sale_amount, ap.is_signed AS signed_flag FROM artist_profile ap LEFT JOIN artist_level al ON al.id = ap.level_id WHERE ap.id = #{artistId} AND ap.status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1

SELECT id AS artwork_id, artwork_no, title, ( SELECT media_url FROM artwork_media am WHERE am.artwork_id = artwork.id ORDER BY am.is_main DESC, am.sort_no ASC, am.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS cover_url, current_price, status AS sale_status FROM artwork WHERE artist_id = #{artistId} AND status IN ('PUBLISHED', 'COLLECTED', 'SOLD_OUT') ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT ap.id AS artist_id, ap.artist_name, ap.avatar_url AS avatar, ap.background_image_url, COALESCE(al.level_name, '签约艺术家') AS level_name, COALESCE(ap.slogan, ap.bio, '签约艺术家，作品持续上新中') AS slogan, ap.bio, ap.style_tags, ap.follower_count AS fan_count, ap.work_count, ap.sale_count AS sold_count, CAST(ap.total_sale_amount AS CHAR) AS total_sale_amount, ap.is_signed AS signed_flag FROM artist_profile ap LEFT JOIN artist_level al ON al.id = ap.level_id WHERE ap.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY ap.is_signed DESC, ap.follower_count DESC, ap.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
